<h1>Source code for booktx.validate</h1><div class="highlight"><pre>
<span></span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Validation of agent-translated chunks against the booktx contract.</span>

<span class="sd">The validator loads every source chunk in ``.booktx/chunks/`` and the matching</span>
<span class="sd">translated chunk in ``.booktx/translated/`` (if present), and enforces the</span>
<span class="sd">hard rules from ``booktx_coding_agent_start.md``:</span>

<span class="sd">- The translated JSON must be valid JSON.</span>
<span class="sd">- The record count must be unchanged.</span>
<span class="sd">- No record id may change.</span>
<span class="sd">- No target may be empty.</span>
<span class="sd">- No placeholder may be removed or changed.</span>
<span class="sd">- No protected name may be translated or removed.</span>
<span class="sd">- The translated file must contain no commentary outside the JSON structure.</span>

<span class="sd">The goal is **one source sentence to one translated sentence**. The validator</span>
<span class="sd">never merges or splits records.</span>

<span class="sd">A :class:`ValidationReport` collects per-chunk findings and a summary, and is</span>
<span class="sd">written to ``.booktx/reports/``. ``validate_project`` returns the report and</span>
<span class="sd">exits non-zero on any mandatory failure.</span>
<span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

<div class="viewcode-block" id="Finding">

<span class="nd">@dataclass</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">slots</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="k">class</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nc">Finding</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;One validation finding for one chunk.</span>

<span class="sd">    Optional location/context fields are populated from EPUB inline-XHTML</span>
<span class="sd">    preflight findings and left empty for plain record-level findings. They</span>
<span class="sd">    are included in :meth:`as_dict` only when non-empty so the JSON report</span>
<span class="sd">    stays backward compatible and readable.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">severity</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">rule</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">message</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">record_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">record_ids</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">chapter_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">chapter_title</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">span_index</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">block_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">document_href</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">source</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">target</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">candidate_kind</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">candidate_ref</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">candidate_scope</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>

<div class="viewcode-block" id="Finding.as_dict">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.validate.Finding.as_dict">[docs]</a>
    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">as_dict</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">object</span><span class="p">]:</span>
        <span class="n">data</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">object</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;chunk_id&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;severity&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">severity</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;rule&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">rule</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;message&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">message</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;record_id&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">}</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">record_ids</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">data</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;record_ids&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">record_ids</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_id</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">data</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;chapter_id&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_id</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_title</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">data</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;chapter_title&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_title</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">span_index</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">data</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;span_index&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">span_index</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">block_id</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">data</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;block_id&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">block_id</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">document_href</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">data</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;document_href&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">document_href</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">data</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;source&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">data</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;target&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">candidate_kind</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">data</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;candidate_kind&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">candidate_kind</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">candidate_ref</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">data</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;candidate_ref&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">candidate_ref</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">candidate_scope</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">data</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;candidate_scope&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">candidate_scope</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">data</span></div>
</div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="ValidationReport">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.validate.ValidationReport">[docs]</a>
<span class="nd">@dataclass</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">slots</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="k">class</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nc">ValidationReport</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Aggregated validation result for a project.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">project</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">profile</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">target_language</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">target_locale</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">findings</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">chunks_checked</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>
    <span class="n">chunks_passed</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>
    <span class="n">chunks_missing_translation</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>
    <span class="n">generated_at</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="nd">@property</span>
    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">errors</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">]:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">[</span><span class="n">f</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">f</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">findings</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">f</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">severity</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">Severity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ERROR</span><span class="p">]</span>

    <span class="nd">@property</span>
    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">warnings</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">]:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">[</span><span class="n">f</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">f</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">findings</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">f</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">severity</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">Severity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">WARN</span><span class="p">]</span>

    <span class="nd">@property</span>
    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">passed</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">bool</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">errors</span>

<div class="viewcode-block" id="ValidationReport.as_dict">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.validate.ValidationReport.as_dict">[docs]</a>
    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">as_dict</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">object</span><span class="p">]:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">{</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;project&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;profile&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">profile</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;target_language&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target_language</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;target_locale&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target_locale</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;generated_at&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">generated_at</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;passed&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">passed</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;chunks_checked&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunks_checked</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;chunks_passed&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunks_passed</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;chunks_missing_translation&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunks_missing_translation</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;error_count&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">errors</span><span class="p">),</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;warning_count&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">warnings</span><span class="p">),</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;findings&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="p">[</span><span class="n">f</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">as_dict</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">f</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">findings</span><span class="p">],</span>
        <span class="p">}</span></div>


    <span class="nd">@property</span>
    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">blocking_findings</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Findings that affect pass/fail regardless of history mode.</span>

<span class="sd">        Effective-output and structural findings always count. Inactive</span>
<span class="sd">        historical content findings are excluded: they describe candidates</span>
<span class="sd">        that are not the current output and must not fail a normal build.</span>
<span class="sd">        &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">[</span><span class="n">f</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">f</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">findings</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">f</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">candidate_scope</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;inactive&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span>

    <span class="nd">@property</span>
    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">inactive_findings</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">        </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Findings about inactive historical translation candidates.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">[</span><span class="n">f</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">f</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">findings</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">f</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">candidate_scope</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;inactive&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="EffectiveTranslations">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.validate.EffectiveTranslations">[docs]</a>
<span class="nd">@dataclass</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">slots</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="k">class</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nc">EffectiveTranslations</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Merged accepted translations from the store and valid legacy chunks.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">chunks</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">TranslatedChunk</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">findings</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">)</span></div>



<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">validation_exits_nonzero</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">report</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">ValidationReport</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">fail_on_warnings</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">fail_on_history_warnings</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">bool</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Decide whether the ``validate``/``check`` CLI should exit non-zero.</span>

<span class="sd">    Shared by both commands so history handling stays identical:</span>

<span class="sd">    - Effective-output and structural findings always count.</span>
<span class="sd">    - Inactive historical content errors are fatal when present (they only</span>
<span class="sd">      survive as errors under ``--all-versions-strict``, where inactive</span>
<span class="sd">      content errors are not downgraded to warnings).</span>
<span class="sd">    - Effective/structural warnings count only under ``fail_on_warnings``.</span>
<span class="sd">    - Inactive warnings count only under ``fail_on_history_warnings``.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">blocking</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">report</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">blocking_findings</span>
    <span class="n">inactive</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">report</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">inactive_findings</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="nb">any</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">f</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">severity</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">Severity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ERROR</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">f</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">blocking</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">True</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="nb">any</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">f</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">severity</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">Severity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ERROR</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">f</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">inactive</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">True</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">fail_on_warnings</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="nb">any</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">f</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">severity</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">Severity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">WARN</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">f</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">blocking</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">True</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">fail_on_history_warnings</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="nb">any</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">f</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">severity</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">Severity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">WARN</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">f</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">inactive</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">True</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">False</span>


<span class="c1"># --- per-pair validation -----------------------------------------------------</span>

<span class="c1"># Recognized outer (enclosing) quotation-mark pairs.</span>
<span class="c1"># Visible-text edge checks use these to decide whether a record is fully</span>
<span class="c1"># enclosed in dialogue quotes. A pair must match exactly: we reject</span>
<span class="c1"># mismatched open/close combinations such as `„...«`.</span>
<span class="n">_SOURCE_OUTER_QUOTE_PAIRS</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">frozenset</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="p">{</span>
        <span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\u2018</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\u2019</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">),</span>  <span class="c1"># ‘...’</span>
        <span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\u201c</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\u201d</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">),</span>  <span class="c1"># “...”</span>
        <span class="p">(</span><span class="s1">&#39;&quot;&#39;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">&#39;&quot;&#39;</span><span class="p">),</span>  <span class="c1"># &quot;...&quot;</span>
        <span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;&#39;&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&#39;&quot;</span><span class="p">),</span>  <span class="c1"># &#39;...&#39;</span>
        <span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\u00ab</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\u00bb</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">),</span>  <span class="c1"># «...»</span>
        <span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\u00bb</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\u00ab</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">),</span>  <span class="c1"># »...«</span>
    <span class="p">}</span>
<span class="p">)</span>

<span class="c1"># Target pairs are locale-tolerant: German „...“, guillemets, curly</span>
<span class="c1"># quotes, low-high ‚...‘, plus straight-quote fallbacks.</span>
<span class="n">_TARGET_OUTER_QUOTE_PAIRS</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">frozenset</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="p">{</span>
        <span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\u201e</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\u201c</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">),</span>  <span class="c1"># „...“ (German)</span>
        <span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\u00bb</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\u00ab</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">),</span>  <span class="c1"># »...« (German guillemets)</span>
        <span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\u201c</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\u201d</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">),</span>  <span class="c1"># “...”</span>
        <span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\u2018</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\u2019</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">),</span>  <span class="c1"># ‘...’</span>
        <span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\u201a</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\u2018</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">),</span>  <span class="c1"># ‚...‘ (German single low-9)</span>
        <span class="p">(</span><span class="s1">&#39;&quot;&#39;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">&#39;&quot;&#39;</span><span class="p">),</span>  <span class="c1"># &quot;...&quot;</span>
        <span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;&#39;&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&#39;&quot;</span><span class="p">),</span>  <span class="c1"># &#39;...&#39;</span>
        <span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\u00ab</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\u00bb</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">),</span>  <span class="c1"># «...»</span>
    <span class="p">}</span>
<span class="p">)</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_visible_text_for_quote_edges</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">fragment</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Return visible text for quote-edge checks.</span>

<span class="sd">    When the fragment carries inline XHTML, the surrounding/inner tags must</span>
<span class="sd">    not affect which characters sit at the visible edges, so `&lt;i&gt;‘X.’&lt;/i&gt;`</span>
<span class="sd">    is treated as `‘X.’`. Plain (non-XHTML) fragments are only HTML-unescaped</span>
<span class="sd">    and stripped of surrounding whitespace.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&lt;&quot;</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">fragment</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&gt;&quot;</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">fragment</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">try</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.epub_inline_xhtml</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">strip_inline_xhtml</span>

            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">strip_inline_xhtml</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">fragment</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">()</span>
        <span class="k">except</span> <span class="ne">Exception</span><span class="p">:</span>  <span class="c1"># noqa: BLE001 - never mask XHTML validation root cause</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">unescape</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">fragment</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">()</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">unescape</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">fragment</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">()</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_outer_quote_pair</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">tuple</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Return the (open, close) visible edge chars of *text*, or None.</span>

<span class="sd">    None is returned for fragments shorter than two visible characters so</span>
<span class="sd">    that a lone quote mark or empty record is never reported as a complete</span>
<span class="sd">    outer pair on either side.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">visible</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_visible_text_for_quote_edges</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">visible</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="mi">2</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">visible</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">],</span> <span class="n">visible</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="o">-</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">]</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_source_is_fully_outer_quoted</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">source_text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">bool</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="n">pair</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_outer_quote_pair</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">source_text</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">pair</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">_SOURCE_OUTER_QUOTE_PAIRS</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_target_is_fully_outer_quoted</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">target_text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">bool</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="n">pair</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_outer_quote_pair</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">target_text</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">pair</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">_TARGET_OUTER_QUOTE_PAIRS</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_load_source_chunk</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">path</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">Chunk</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">Chunk</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">model_validate_json</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">path</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">read_text</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;utf-8&quot;</span><span class="p">))</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_load_source_chunk_with_findings</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">path</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">tuple</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Chunk</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">]]:</span>
    <span class="n">chunk_id</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">path</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">stem</span>
    <span class="k">try</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">raw</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">json</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">loads</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">path</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">read_text</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;utf-8&quot;</span><span class="p">))</span>
    <span class="k">except</span> <span class="n">json</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">JSONDecodeError</span> <span class="k">as</span> <span class="n">exc</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
            <span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">severity</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">Severity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ERROR</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">rule</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;invalid_source_chunk&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">message</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;source chunk </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">path</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">name</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> is invalid JSON: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">exc</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">msg</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> &quot;</span>
                    <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;(line </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">exc</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">lineno</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> col </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">exc</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">colno</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">)&quot;</span>
                <span class="p">),</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="p">]</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="nb">isinstance</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">raw</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
            <span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">severity</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">Severity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ERROR</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">rule</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;invalid_source_chunk&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">message</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;source chunk </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">path</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">name</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> is not a JSON object&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="p">]</span>
    <span class="k">try</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">chunk</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Chunk</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">model_validate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">raw</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">except</span> <span class="ne">Exception</span> <span class="k">as</span> <span class="n">exc</span><span class="p">:</span>  <span class="c1"># noqa: BLE001</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
            <span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">raw</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;chunk_id&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">)),</span>
                <span class="n">severity</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">Severity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ERROR</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">rule</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;invalid_source_chunk&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">message</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;source chunk </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">path</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">name</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> is invalid: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">exc</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="p">]</span>
    <span class="n">findings</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="n">raw_schema_version</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">raw</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;schema_version&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">raw_schema_version</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
        <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="nb">isinstance</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">raw_schema_version</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">raw_schema_version</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">SUPPORTED_SOURCE_CHUNK_SCHEMA_VERSIONS</span>
    <span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="n">findings</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chunk</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">severity</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">Severity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ERROR</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">rule</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;unsupported_chunk_schema_version&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">message</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;chunk </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">chunk</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> uses unsupported schema_version &quot;</span>
                    <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">raw_schema_version</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>
                <span class="p">),</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">chunk</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">findings</span>


<div class="viewcode-block" id="strict_load_translated">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.validate.strict_load_translated">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">strict_load_translated</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">path</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">tuple</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">TranslatedChunk</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Load a translated chunk, detecting commentary outside the JSON.</span>

<span class="sd">    Returns ``(model_or_None, error_message_or_None)``. We parse twice: once</span>
<span class="sd">    permissively into the model, once strictly to catch trailing commentary.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">raw</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">path</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">read_text</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;utf-8&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="c1"># Strict parse: json.loads rejects trailing data, so commentary after the</span>
    <span class="c1"># closing brace (the common agent mistake) is caught here.</span>
    <span class="k">try</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">data</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">json</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">loads</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">raw</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">parse_int</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">parse_float</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">float</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">except</span> <span class="n">json</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">JSONDecodeError</span> <span class="k">as</span> <span class="n">exc</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;invalid JSON: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">exc</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">msg</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> (line </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">exc</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">lineno</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> col </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">exc</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">colno</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">)&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="nb">isinstance</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">data</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;translated file is not a JSON object&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">try</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">model</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">TranslatedChunk</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">model_validate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">data</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">except</span> <span class="ne">Exception</span> <span class="k">as</span> <span class="n">exc</span><span class="p">:</span>  <span class="c1"># noqa: BLE001</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;schema mismatch: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">exc</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>
    <span class="c1"># Detect commentary BEFORE the first &#39;{&#39; or AFTER the last &#39;}&#39;.</span>
    <span class="n">stripped</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">raw</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">lstrip</span><span class="p">()</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">stripped</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">startswith</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;{&quot;</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">model</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;translated file has commentary before the JSON object&quot;</span>
    <span class="c1"># Find the real end of the top-level object via the parsed span.</span>
    <span class="n">decoder</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">json</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">JSONDecoder</span><span class="p">()</span>
    <span class="n">obj</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">end</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">decoder</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">raw_decode</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">raw</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">lstrip</span><span class="p">())</span>
    <span class="n">trailing</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">raw</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">lstrip</span><span class="p">()[</span><span class="n">end</span><span class="p">:]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">()</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">trailing</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">model</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;translated file has commentary after the JSON object&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">model</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">None</span></div>



<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_check_placeholders_preserved</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">source_rec</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Record</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">target_rec</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">TranslatedRecord</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Ensure every placeholder token in the source appears unchanged in target.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">findings</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="n">src_tokens</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">set</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">collect_tokens</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">source_rec</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source</span><span class="p">))</span>
    <span class="n">tgt_text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">target_rec</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target</span>
    <span class="n">tgt_tokens</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">set</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">collect_tokens</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">tgt_text</span><span class="p">))</span>
    <span class="n">missing</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">src_tokens</span> <span class="o">-</span> <span class="n">tgt_tokens</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">tok</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">sorted</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">missing</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="n">findings</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">severity</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">Severity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ERROR</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">rule</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;placeholder_removed_or_changed&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">message</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;placeholder </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">tok</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> removed/changed in record </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">target_rec</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">record_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">target_rec</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="c1"># Also flag any NEW placeholder tokens the agent invented.</span>
    <span class="n">extra</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">tgt_tokens</span> <span class="o">-</span> <span class="n">src_tokens</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">tok</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">sorted</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">extra</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="n">findings</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">severity</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">Severity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ERROR</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">rule</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;placeholder_added&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">message</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;unexpected placeholder </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">tok</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> appears in record &quot;</span>
                    <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">target_rec</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">; placeholders must be preserved exactly&quot;</span>
                <span class="p">),</span>
                <span class="n">record_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">target_rec</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">findings</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_check_protected_names_preserved</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">source_rec</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Record</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">target_rec</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">TranslatedRecord</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Ensure each protected name (NAME placeholder) survives verbatim.</span>

<span class="sd">    Protected names are encoded as ``__NAME_NNN__`` placeholders whose</span>
<span class="sd">    ``Placeholder.original`` is the verbatim term. After translation, the token</span>
<span class="sd">    must still be present (handled by placeholder check) AND, when restored,</span>
<span class="sd">    yield the original term. We additionally forbid the agent from inlining a</span>
<span class="sd">    translated form of the name: if the original term was protected but a</span>
<span class="sd">    non-token variant appears... we rely on the placeholder check, and add a</span>
<span class="sd">    dedicated finding category if the NAME token is absent so the rule name</span>
<span class="sd">    matches the spec.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">findings</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="n">visible_tokens</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">set</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">collect_tokens</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">source_rec</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source</span><span class="p">))</span>
    <span class="n">name_tokens</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span>
        <span class="n">p</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">token</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">p</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">original</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">p</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">source_rec</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">placeholders</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">p</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">kind</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;name&quot;</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">p</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">token</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">visible_tokens</span>
    <span class="p">}</span>
    <span class="n">tgt_text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">target_rec</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">token</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">original</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">name_tokens</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">items</span><span class="p">():</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">token</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">tgt_text</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">findings</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">severity</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">Severity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ERROR</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">rule</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;protected_name_translated_or_removed&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">message</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">(</span>
                        <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;protected name </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">original</span><span class="si">!r}</span><span class="s2"> (</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">token</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">) was translated &quot;</span>
                        <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;or removed in record </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">target_rec</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>
                    <span class="p">),</span>
                    <span class="n">record_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">target_rec</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">findings</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_check_inline_xhtml</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">source_rec</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Record</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">target_rec</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">TranslatedRecord</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">]:</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">source_rec</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_markup</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;epub-inline-xhtml:v1&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.epub_inline_xhtml</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">sanitize_target_fragment</span>

    <span class="n">sanitized</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">sanitize_target_fragment</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">target_rec</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">source_rec</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">findings</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">issue</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">sanitized</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">issues</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">findings</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">severity</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">issue</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">severity</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">rule</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">issue</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">rule</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">message</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">issue</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">message</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">record_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">target_rec</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">findings</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_check_outer_quotation_preserved</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">source_rec</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Record</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">target_rec</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">TranslatedRecord</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Require a complete enclosing quote pair in the target when the source has one.</span>

<span class="sd">    Rule ``outer_quotation_marks_preserved``. The check operates on visible</span>
<span class="sd">    text so inline XHTML tags at the edges are ignored. Only records whose</span>
<span class="sd">    visible source text starts AND ends with a recognized outer pair are in</span>
<span class="sd">    scope; split/continuation dialogue spans are not flagged.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">_source_is_fully_outer_quoted</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">source_rec</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">_target_is_fully_outer_quoted</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">target_rec</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="n">source_pair</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_outer_quote_pair</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">source_rec</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="c1"># _source_is_fully_outer_quoted() above already confirmed a recognized</span>
    <span class="c1"># source pair exists, so source_pair cannot be None here.</span>
    <span class="k">assert</span> <span class="n">source_pair</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">target_pair</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_outer_quote_pair</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">target_rec</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">detail</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;the target is not enclosed in a complete accepted quotation pair&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">target_pair</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">opener</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">closer</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">target_pair</span>
        <span class="n">accepted_openers</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span><span class="n">pair</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">pair</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">_TARGET_OUTER_QUOTE_PAIRS</span><span class="p">}</span>
        <span class="n">accepted_closers</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span><span class="n">pair</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">pair</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">_TARGET_OUTER_QUOTE_PAIRS</span><span class="p">}</span>
        <span class="n">source_openers</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span><span class="n">pair</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">pair</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">_SOURCE_OUTER_QUOTE_PAIRS</span><span class="p">}</span>
        <span class="n">source_closers</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span><span class="n">pair</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">pair</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">_SOURCE_OUTER_QUOTE_PAIRS</span><span class="p">}</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">opener</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">accepted_openers</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">opener</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">source_openers</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">detail</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;the target opening quotation mark is not recognized&quot;</span>
        <span class="k">elif</span> <span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">closer</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
            <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">closer</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">accepted_closers</span>
            <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">closer</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">source_closers</span>
        <span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="n">detail</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;the target closing quotation mark is not recognized&quot;</span>
        <span class="k">elif</span> <span class="n">opener</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">accepted_openers</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="c1"># Recognized opener but the pair as a whole is not accepted:</span>
            <span class="c1"># the closer is missing or mismatches the opener.</span>
            <span class="n">matching</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span>
                <span class="n">pair</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">pair</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">_TARGET_OUTER_QUOTE_PAIRS</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">pair</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">opener</span>
            <span class="p">}</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">closer</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">matching</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="c1"># Defensive: should have been caught by the pass branch.</span>
                <span class="n">detail</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;the target quotation pair is not accepted&quot;</span>
            <span class="k">elif</span> <span class="n">closer</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">accepted_closers</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">closer</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">source_closers</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">detail</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="s2">&quot;the target mixes quote styles within one outer pair &quot;</span>
                    <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;(opens </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">opener</span><span class="si">!r}</span><span class="s2">, closes </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">closer</span><span class="si">!r}</span><span class="s2">)&quot;</span>
                <span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">detail</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;the target opens </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">opener</span><span class="si">!r}</span><span class="s2"> but lacks the matching closing quote&quot;</span>
                <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">elif</span> <span class="n">closer</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">accepted_closers</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">closer</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">source_closers</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">detail</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;the target closes </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">closer</span><span class="si">!r}</span><span class="s2"> but lacks the matching opening quote&quot;</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">[</span>
        <span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">severity</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">Severity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ERROR</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">rule</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;outer_quotation_marks_preserved&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">message</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;record </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">target_rec</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> source is fully enclosed in &quot;</span>
                <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;quotation marks </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="nb">tuple</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">c</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="k">for</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">c</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="ow">in</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">source_pair</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">, but &quot;</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="n">detail</span>
            <span class="p">),</span>
            <span class="n">record_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">target_rec</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">source</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">source_rec</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">target</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">target_rec</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="p">]</span>


<div class="viewcode-block" id="validate_record_pair">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.validate.validate_record_pair">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">validate_record_pair</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">source_rec</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Record</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">target_rec</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">TranslatedRecord</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">context</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">TranslationContext</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Validate one translated record against one source record.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">findings</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">target_rec</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">target_rec</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">():</span>
        <span class="n">findings</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">severity</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">Severity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ERROR</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">rule</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;empty_target&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">message</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;record </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">target_rec</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> has an empty target&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">record_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">target_rec</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">findings</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">extend</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">_check_placeholders_preserved</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">source_rec</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">target_rec</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">))</span>
    <span class="n">findings</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">extend</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">_check_protected_names_preserved</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">source_rec</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">target_rec</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">))</span>
    <span class="n">glossary_evaluations</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">evaluate_glossary_entries</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">glossary</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">context</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">glossary</span><span class="p">,</span>
