            <span class="n">source_text</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">source_rec</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">target</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">target_rec</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">context</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
        <span class="k">else</span> <span class="p">{}</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">findings</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">extend</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">_check_forbidden_terms</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">source_rec</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">target_rec</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">context</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">glossary_evaluations</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">findings</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">extend</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">_check_required_glossary_targets</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">source_rec</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">target_rec</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">context</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">glossary_evaluations</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">findings</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">extend</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">_check_inline_xhtml</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">source_rec</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">target_rec</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">))</span>
    <span class="n">findings</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">extend</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">_check_outer_quotation_preserved</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">source_rec</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">target_rec</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">))</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">findings</span></div>



<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_check_forbidden_terms</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">source_rec</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Record</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">target_rec</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">TranslatedRecord</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">context</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">TranslationContext</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">evaluations_by_entry</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">GlossaryEntryEvaluation</span><span class="p">]],</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Check glossary forbidden target terms for one record pair.</span>

<span class="sd">    Forbidden targets are scoped to records whose source contains the</span>
<span class="sd">    entry&#39;s source term or one of its source variants.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">context</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="n">findings</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">idx</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">entry</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">enumerate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">context</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">glossary</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">entry</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">enforce</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;off&quot;</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">entry</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">forbidden_targets</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>
        <span class="n">severity</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Severity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ERROR</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">entry</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">enforce</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;error&quot;</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="n">Severity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">WARN</span>
        <span class="n">entry_findings</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">evaluation</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">evaluations_by_entry</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">idx</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[]):</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">evaluation</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">evaluation</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">status</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;forbidden_target&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="k">continue</span>
            <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">forbidden</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">evaluation</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">evaluation</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">forbidden_target_found</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">entry_findings</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">(</span>
                        <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                        <span class="n">severity</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">severity</span><span class="p">,</span>
                        <span class="n">rule</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;forbidden_term_used&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                        <span class="n">message</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">entry</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> must not be translated as </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">forbidden</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                        <span class="n">record_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">target_rec</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">findings</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">extend</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">entry_findings</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">findings</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_check_required_glossary_targets</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">source_rec</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Record</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">target_rec</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">TranslatedRecord</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">context</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">TranslationContext</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">evaluations_by_entry</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">GlossaryEntryEvaluation</span><span class="p">]],</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Positively enforce approved glossary targets for one record pair.</span>

<span class="sd">    When an entry has ``require_target`` and its source rule applies, the</span>
<span class="sd">    target must contain the approved target or one of its target variants;</span>
<span class="sd">    otherwise a ``glossary_target_missing`` finding is emitted at the entry&#39;s</span>
<span class="sd">    enforcement severity.</span>

<span class="sd">    This is a record-level heuristic: it proves only that an allowed target</span>
<span class="sd">    form occurs somewhere in the same record. It does not establish</span>
<span class="sd">    word-level source/target alignment.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">context</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="n">findings</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">_idx</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">entry</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">enumerate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">context</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">glossary</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">entry</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">enforce</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;off&quot;</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">entry</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">require_target</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>
        <span class="n">evaluations</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">evaluations_by_entry</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">_idx</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[])</span>
        <span class="n">missing</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span>
            <span class="n">evaluation</span>
            <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">evaluation</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">evaluations</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">evaluation</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">evaluation</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">required_target_found</span>
                <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">evaluation</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">evaluation</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">allowed_target_found</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="p">]</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">missing</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>
        <span class="n">approved</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">target_terms</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">entry</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">approved</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="c1"># Cannot require a target that is undefined.</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>
        <span class="n">severity</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Severity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ERROR</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">entry</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">enforce</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;error&quot;</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="n">Severity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">WARN</span>
        <span class="n">matched</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">missing</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">matched_span</span>
        <span class="n">phrase_excerpt</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">source_phrase_window</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">source_rec</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">matched</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">start</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">matched</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">end</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">message</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">format_glossary_missing_message</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">entry</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">entry</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">approved</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">approved</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">matched</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">matched</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">phrase_excerpt</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">phrase_excerpt</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">source</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">source_rec</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">target</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">target_rec</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">glossary</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">context</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">glossary</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">findings</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">severity</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">severity</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">rule</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;glossary_target_missing&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">message</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">message</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">record_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">target_rec</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">source</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">source_rec</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">target</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">target_rec</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">findings</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_validate_translated_chunk</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">source</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Chunk</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">translated</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">TranslatedChunk</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">context</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">TranslationContext</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Validate one source chunk against a translated chunk model.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">chunk_id</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">source</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span>
    <span class="n">findings</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>

    <span class="c1"># chunk_id must match.</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">translated</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">findings</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">severity</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">Severity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ERROR</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">rule</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;chunk_id_changed&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">message</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;translated chunk_id is </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">translated</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="si">!r}</span><span class="s2">, &quot;</span>
                    <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;expected </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="si">!r}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>
                <span class="p">),</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">src_records</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span><span class="n">r</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">r</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">r</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">source</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">records</span><span class="p">}</span>
    <span class="n">tgt_records</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span><span class="n">r</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">r</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">r</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">translated</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">records</span><span class="p">}</span>

    <span class="c1"># Record count must be unchanged.</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">translated</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">records</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">source</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">records</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="n">findings</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">severity</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">Severity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ERROR</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">rule</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;record_count_changed&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">message</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;translated chunk has </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">translated</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">records</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> records, &quot;</span>
                    <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;expected </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">source</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">records</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>
                <span class="p">),</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="c1"># No record id may change: exact set equality.</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="nb">set</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">src_records</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="nb">set</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">tgt_records</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="n">missing</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">sorted</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nb">set</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">src_records</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-</span> <span class="nb">set</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">tgt_records</span><span class="p">))</span>
        <span class="n">added</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">sorted</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nb">set</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">tgt_records</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-</span> <span class="nb">set</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">src_records</span><span class="p">))</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">missing</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">findings</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">severity</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">Severity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ERROR</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">rule</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;record_id_removed&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">message</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;record ids removed/changed: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="s1">&#39;, &#39;</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">join</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">missing</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">),</span>
                <span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">added</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">findings</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">severity</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">Severity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ERROR</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">rule</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;record_id_added&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">message</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;unexpected record ids: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="s1">&#39;, &#39;</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">join</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">added</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">),</span>
                <span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="c1"># Per-record checks for ids present on both sides.</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">rid</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">src_rec</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">src_records</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">items</span><span class="p">():</span>
        <span class="n">tgt_rec</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">tgt_records</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">rid</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">tgt_rec</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>
        <span class="n">findings</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">extend</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">validate_record_pair</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">src_rec</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">tgt_rec</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">context</span><span class="p">))</span>

    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">findings</span>


<div class="viewcode-block" id="validate_chunk_pair">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.validate.validate_chunk_pair">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">validate_chunk_pair</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">source</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Chunk</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">translated_path</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Path</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">context</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">TranslationContext</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Validate one source chunk against its translated file (if any).&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">chunk_id</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">source</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span>
    <span class="n">findings</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>

    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">translated_path</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">findings</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">translated_path</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">is_file</span><span class="p">():</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">findings</span>

    <span class="n">translated</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">err</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">strict_load_translated</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">translated_path</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">err</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">findings</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">severity</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">Severity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ERROR</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">rule</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;invalid_json_or_commentary&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">message</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">err</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">findings</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">translated</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">findings</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">_validate_translated_chunk</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">source</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">translated</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">context</span><span class="p">)</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="load_validation_context">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.validate.load_validation_context">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">load_validation_context</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">project</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">context_view_path</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">TranslationContext</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Load the context that should be used for validation.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">context_view_path</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">load_context</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">path</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">resolve_stored_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">context_view_path</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">TranslationContext</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">model_validate_json</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">path</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">read_text</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;utf-8&quot;</span><span class="p">))</span></div>



<span class="c1"># --- project-level validation -----------------------------------------------</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_active_review_usability_finding</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">stored</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">StoredTranslationRecordV2</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">record_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">Finding</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Return an ERROR finding when an active_review cannot be used safely.</span>

<span class="sd">    A set-but-unusable active_review means the selected output would silently</span>
<span class="sd">    fall back to the active translation version, which is a data-corruption</span>
<span class="sd">    risk. Missing, rejected, stale, cyclic, or invalid-pass-order reviews are</span>
<span class="sd">    reported as errors regardless of the pass ``enforce`` setting.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">stored</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">active_review</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">review</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">find_review_candidate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">stored</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">stored</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">active_review</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">review</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">severity</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">Severity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ERROR</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">rule</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;active_review_missing&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">message</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;store record </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> active_review </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">stored</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">active_review</span><span class="si">!r}</span><span class="s2"> &quot;</span>
                <span class="s2">&quot;has no matching review candidate&quot;</span>
            <span class="p">),</span>
            <span class="n">record_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">review</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">status</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;accepted&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">severity</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">Severity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ERROR</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">rule</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;active_review_not_accepted&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">message</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;active review </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">review</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">review_ref</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> for record </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> &quot;</span>
                <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;is </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">review</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">status</span><span class="si">!r}</span><span class="s2">, not accepted&quot;</span>
            <span class="p">),</span>
            <span class="n">record_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">review_chain_is_stale</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">stored</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">review</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">review_ref</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">severity</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">Severity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ERROR</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">rule</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;active_review_base_drift&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">message</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;active review </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">review</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">review_ref</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> for record </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> &quot;</span>
                <span class="s2">&quot;has a stale or missing derivation chain&quot;</span>
            <span class="p">),</span>
            <span class="n">record_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">None</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_accepted_review_for_pass</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">stored</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">StoredTranslationRecordV2</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">pass_number</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">TranslationReviewCandidate</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Return an accepted, chain-valid review candidate for a pass, if any.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">review</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">stored</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">reviews</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">review</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">pass_number</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">pass_number</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">review</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">status</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;accepted&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">review_chain_is_stale</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">stored</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">review</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">review_ref</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">review</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">None</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_stale_or_rejected_review_for_pass</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">stored</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">StoredTranslationRecordV2</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">pass_number</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">TranslationReviewCandidate</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Return a stale, rejected, or superseded review for a pass, if any.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">review</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">stored</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">reviews</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">review</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">pass_number</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">pass_number</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">review</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">status</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;accepted&quot;</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">review_chain_is_stale</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">stored</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">review</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">review_ref</span>
        <span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">review</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">None</span>


<div class="viewcode-block" id="review_coverage_findings">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.validate.review_coverage_findings">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">review_coverage_findings</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">stored</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">StoredTranslationRecordV2</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">quality_cfg</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">QualityReviewConfig</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">record_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">force_error</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Per-pass review-coverage findings for one record.</span>

<span class="sd">    ``force_error`` (used by ``build --require-reviewed``) treats every coverage</span>
<span class="sd">    gap as an ERROR regardless of the pass ``enforce`` setting. Otherwise gaps</span>
<span class="sd">    are emitted only when ``enforce`` is ``warn`` or ``error`` and the severity</span>
<span class="sd">    follows ``enforce``.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">findings</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">quality_cfg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">enabled</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">findings</span>
    <span class="c1"># Only records with an accepted active translation version are eligible.</span>
    <span class="n">active</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">active_candidate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">stored</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">active</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">active</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">status</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;accepted&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">findings</span>
    <span class="n">pass_cfg_by_number</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span><span class="n">p</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">pass_number</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">p</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">p</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">quality_cfg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">passes</span><span class="p">}</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">pass_number</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">quality_cfg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">active_passes</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">pcfg</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">pass_cfg_by_number</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">pass_number</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">enforce</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">pcfg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">enforce</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">pcfg</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="s2">&quot;off&quot;</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">force_error</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">severity</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Severity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ERROR</span>
        <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">enforce</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;off&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="k">continue</span>
            <span class="n">severity</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Severity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ERROR</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">enforce</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;error&quot;</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="n">Severity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">WARN</span>
        <span class="c1"># Blocked by a missing required prior pass?</span>
        <span class="n">required</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">pcfg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">required_base_pass</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">pcfg</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">required</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
            <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">required</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">pass_number</span>
            <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">_accepted_review_for_pass</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">stored</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">required</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
        <span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="n">findings</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">severity</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">severity</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">rule</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;review_pass_blocked&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">message</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">(</span>
                        <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;record </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> pass </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">pass_number</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> blocked: &quot;</span>
                        <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;required pass </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">required</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> is missing&quot;</span>
                    <span class="p">),</span>
                    <span class="n">record_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">_accepted_review_for_pass</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">stored</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">pass_number</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">_stale_or_rejected_review_for_pass</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">stored</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">pass_number</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">findings</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">severity</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">severity</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">rule</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;stale_review_candidate&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">message</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">(</span>
                        <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;record </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> has only a stale review &quot;</span>
                        <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;for pass </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">pass_number</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>
                    <span class="p">),</span>
                    <span class="n">record_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">findings</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">severity</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">severity</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">rule</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;missing_review_candidate&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">message</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">(</span>
                        <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;record </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> is missing an accepted review &quot;</span>
                        <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;for pass </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">pass_number</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>
                    <span class="p">),</span>
                    <span class="n">record_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">findings</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="load_effective_translated_chunks">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.validate.load_effective_translated_chunks">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">load_effective_translated_chunks</span><span class="p">(</span>  <span class="c1"># noqa: C901</span>
    <span class="n">project</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">source_chunks</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">Chunk</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">context</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">TranslationContext</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">include_inactive_versions</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">all_versions_strict</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">EffectiveTranslations</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Merge valid legacy chunk files and accepted store records.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">source_chunks</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">source_chunks</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span>
            <span class="n">path</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">stem</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">_load_source_chunk</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">path</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">path</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">sorted</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunks</span><span class="p">(),</span> <span class="n">key</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="k">lambda</span> <span class="n">path</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">path</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">stem</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="p">}</span>

    <span class="n">translated_paths</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span><span class="n">p</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">stem</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">p</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">p</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">translated</span><span class="p">()}</span>
    <span class="n">findings</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="n">valid_legacy</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">TranslatedChunk</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{}</span>
    <span class="n">store_records</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">TranslatedRecord</span><span class="p">]]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{}</span>

    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">source</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">source_chunks</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">items</span><span class="p">():</span>
        <span class="n">translated_path</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">translated_paths</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">translated_path</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>
        <span class="n">translated</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">err</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">strict_load_translated</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">translated_path</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">err</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">findings</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">severity</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">Severity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ERROR</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">rule</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;invalid_json_or_commentary&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">message</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">err</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">translated</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>
        <span class="n">chunk_findings</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_validate_translated_chunk</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">source</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">translated</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">context</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">findings</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">extend</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">chunk_findings</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="nb">any</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">f</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">severity</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">Severity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ERROR</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">f</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">chunk_findings</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="n">valid_legacy</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">translated</span>

    <span class="n">stale</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">sorted</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nb">set</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">translated_paths</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-</span> <span class="nb">set</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">source_chunks</span><span class="p">))</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">chunk_id</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">stale</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">findings</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">severity</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">Severity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">WARN</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">rule</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;stale_translation&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">message</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;translated chunk </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> has no matching source chunk &quot;</span>
                    <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;(left in place; remove or re-extract to clear)&quot;</span>
                <span class="p">),</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">raw_store_version</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">store_path</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">translation_store_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">store_path</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">is_file</span><span class="p">():</span>
        <span class="k">try</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">raw_store</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">json</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">loads</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">store_path</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">read_text</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;utf-8&quot;</span><span class="p">))</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="nb">isinstance</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">raw_store</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">):</span>
                <span class="n">raw_store_version</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">raw_store</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;version&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">except</span> <span class="ne">Exception</span><span class="p">:</span>  <span class="c1"># noqa: BLE001</span>
            <span class="n">raw_store_version</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>

    <span class="k">try</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">store</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">load_translation_store</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">except</span> <span class="ne">Exception</span> <span class="k">as</span> <span class="n">exc</span><span class="p">:</span>  <span class="c1"># noqa: BLE001 - surface invalid store structure</span>
        <span class="n">findings</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;store&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">severity</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">Severity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ERROR</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">rule</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;invalid_translation_store&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">message</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;translation-store.json is invalid: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">exc</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">store</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>

    <span class="k">try</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">ledger</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">load_translation_version_ledger</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">except</span> <span class="ne">Exception</span> <span class="k">as</span> <span class="n">exc</span><span class="p">:</span>  <span class="c1"># noqa: BLE001</span>
        <span class="n">findings</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;ledger&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">severity</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">Severity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ERROR</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">rule</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;invalid_translation_version_ledger&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">message</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;translation-version-ledger.json is invalid: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">exc</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">ledger</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>

    <span class="n">quality_cfg</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">profile_config</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">quality_review</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">profile_config</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
        <span class="k">else</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">store</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">record_id</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">stored</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">store</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">records</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">items</span><span class="p">():</span>
            <span class="n">chunk_id</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">stored</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="si">:</span><span class="s2">04d</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>
            <span class="n">source_chunk</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">source_chunks</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">source_chunk</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">findings</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">(</span>
                        <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                        <span class="n">severity</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">Severity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ERROR</span><span class="p">,</span>
                        <span class="n">rule</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;stale_store_record&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                        <span class="n">message</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">(</span>
                            <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;store record </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> has no matching source &quot;</span>
                            <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;chunk </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>
                        <span class="p">),</span>
                        <span class="n">record_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="k">continue</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">chunk_id</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">source_chunk</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span>
                <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">chunk_id</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">record_id</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">split</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;-&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">)[</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">]</span>
            <span class="p">):</span>
                <span class="n">findings</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">(</span>
                        <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                        <span class="n">severity</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">Severity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ERROR</span><span class="p">,</span>
                        <span class="n">rule</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;store_chunk_mismatch&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                        <span class="n">message</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">(</span>
                            <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;store record </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> points to chunk </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">, &quot;</span>
                            <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;but the record id does not match that chunk&quot;</span>
                        <span class="p">),</span>
                        <span class="n">record_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="k">continue</span>

            <span class="n">source_records</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span><span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">record</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">record</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">source_chunk</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">records</span><span class="p">}</span>
            <span class="n">source_rec</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">source_records</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">source_rec</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">findings</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">(</span>
                        <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                        <span class="n">severity</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">Severity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ERROR</span><span class="p">,</span>
                        <span class="n">rule</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;stale_store_record&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                        <span class="n">message</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">(</span>
                            <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;store record </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> has no matching source record&quot;</span>
                        <span class="p">),</span>
                        <span class="n">record_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="k">continue</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">stored</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_sha256</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">stored</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_sha256</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">source_record_sha256</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">source_rec</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source</span>
            <span class="p">):</span>
                <span class="n">findings</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">(</span>
                        <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                        <span class="n">severity</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">Severity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ERROR</span><span class="p">,</span>
                        <span class="n">rule</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;stale_store_record&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                        <span class="n">message</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">(</span>
                            <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;store record </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> no longer matches the &quot;</span>
                            <span class="s2">&quot;current source text&quot;</span>
                        <span class="p">),</span>
                        <span class="n">record_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="k">continue</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">stored</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">stored</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">source_rec</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">findings</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">(</span>
                        <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                        <span class="n">severity</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">Severity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ERROR</span><span class="p">,</span>
                        <span class="n">rule</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;source_text_mismatch&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                        <span class="n">message</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">(</span>
                            <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;store record </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> no longer matches the current &quot;</span>
                            <span class="s2">&quot;source text&quot;</span>
                        <span class="p">),</span>
                        <span class="n">record_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="k">continue</span>

            <span class="c1"># Effective output prefers a chain-valid active review candidate</span>
            <span class="c1"># over the active translation version. A set-but-unusable</span>
            <span class="c1"># active_review is reported as an error because the selected</span>
            <span class="c1"># output would otherwise fall back silently.</span>
            <span class="n">review_finding</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_active_review_usability_finding</span><span class="p">(</span>
