                <span class="n">stored</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">record_id</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">review_finding</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">findings</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">review_finding</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">candidate</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">effective_target_candidate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">stored</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">candidate</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">findings</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">(</span>
                        <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                        <span class="n">severity</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">Severity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ERROR</span><span class="p">,</span>
                        <span class="n">rule</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;invalid_active_version&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                        <span class="n">message</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">(</span>
                            <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;store record </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> has no active version pointing &quot;</span>
                            <span class="s2">&quot;to an available candidate&quot;</span>
                        <span class="p">),</span>
                        <span class="n">record_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="k">continue</span>
            <span class="c1"># Review candidates are not registered in the translation version</span>
            <span class="c1"># ledger and are only returned when already accepted and valid.</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="nb">isinstance</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">candidate</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">TranslationReviewCandidate</span><span class="p">):</span>
                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">ledger</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">raw_store_version</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="mi">2</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">ledger</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">tracks</span><span class="p">):</span>
                    <span class="k">try</span><span class="p">:</span>
                        <span class="n">lookup_version</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">ledger</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">candidate</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">version_ref</span><span class="p">)</span>
                    <span class="k">except</span> <span class="ne">Exception</span><span class="p">:</span>
                        <span class="n">findings</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
                            <span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">(</span>
                                <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                                <span class="n">severity</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">Severity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ERROR</span><span class="p">,</span>
                                <span class="n">rule</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;missing_ledger_version&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                                <span class="n">message</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">(</span>
                                    <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;store record </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> references version &quot;</span>
                                    <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">candidate</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">version_ref</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> missing from the ledger&quot;</span>
                                <span class="p">),</span>
                                <span class="n">record_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                            <span class="p">)</span>
                        <span class="p">)</span>
                        <span class="k">continue</span>
                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">candidate</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">status</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;accepted&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
                    <span class="n">findings</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
                        <span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">(</span>
                            <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                            <span class="n">severity</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">Severity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ERROR</span><span class="p">,</span>
                            <span class="n">rule</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;active_version_not_accepted&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                            <span class="n">message</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">(</span>
                                <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;active version </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">candidate</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">version_ref</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> for record &quot;</span>
                                <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> is not accepted&quot;</span>
                            <span class="p">),</span>
                            <span class="n">record_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                        <span class="p">)</span>
                    <span class="p">)</span>
                    <span class="k">continue</span>

            <span class="n">translated_rec</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">TranslatedRecord</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nb">id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">target</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">candidate</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">effective_kind</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="s2">&quot;review&quot;</span>
                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="nb">isinstance</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">candidate</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">TranslationReviewCandidate</span><span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="k">else</span> <span class="s2">&quot;translation&quot;</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">effective_ref</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">candidate</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">review_ref</span>
                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="nb">isinstance</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">candidate</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">TranslationReviewCandidate</span><span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="k">else</span> <span class="n">candidate</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">version_ref</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">record_findings</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">validate_record_pair</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">source_rec</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">translated_rec</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">context</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">_finding</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">record_findings</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">_finding</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">candidate_kind</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">effective_kind</span>
                <span class="n">_finding</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">candidate_ref</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">effective_ref</span>
                <span class="n">_finding</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">candidate_scope</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;effective&quot;</span>
            <span class="n">findings</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">extend</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">record_findings</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="nb">any</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">f</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">severity</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">Severity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ERROR</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">f</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">record_findings</span><span class="p">):</span>
                <span class="k">continue</span>
            <span class="n">store_records</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">setdefault</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">{})[</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">translated_rec</span>

            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">quality_cfg</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">findings</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">extend</span><span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="n">review_coverage_findings</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">stored</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">quality_cfg</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">record_id</span><span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="p">)</span>

            <span class="c1"># The version already content-validated above as the effective</span>
            <span class="c1"># output is excluded from the inactive loop. When the effective</span>
            <span class="c1"># output is a review candidate, every translation version is</span>
            <span class="c1"># historical content, so none is excluded.</span>
            <span class="n">effective_translation_ref</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="kc">None</span>
                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="nb">isinstance</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">candidate</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">TranslationReviewCandidate</span><span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="k">else</span> <span class="n">candidate</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">version_ref</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">inactive</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">stored</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">versions</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">inactive</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">version_ref</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">effective_translation_ref</span><span class="p">:</span>
                    <span class="k">continue</span>
                <span class="c1"># Structural integrity: ledger referential checks run for ALL</span>
                <span class="c1"># stored versions in every mode. A missing ledger entry is</span>
                <span class="c1"># structural corruption, not a historical content warning, so</span>
                <span class="c1"># it stays fatal regardless of include_inactive_versions.</span>
                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">ledger</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">raw_store_version</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="mi">2</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">ledger</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">tracks</span><span class="p">):</span>
                    <span class="k">try</span><span class="p">:</span>
                        <span class="n">lookup_version</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">ledger</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">inactive</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">version_ref</span><span class="p">)</span>
                    <span class="k">except</span> <span class="ne">Exception</span><span class="p">:</span>
                        <span class="n">findings</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
                            <span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">(</span>
                                <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                                <span class="n">severity</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">Severity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ERROR</span><span class="p">,</span>
                                <span class="n">rule</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;missing_ledger_version&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                                <span class="n">message</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">(</span>
                                    <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;store record </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> references version &quot;</span>
                                    <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">inactive</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">version_ref</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> missing from the ledger&quot;</span>
                                <span class="p">),</span>
                                <span class="n">record_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                            <span class="p">)</span>
                        <span class="p">)</span>
                        <span class="k">continue</span>
                <span class="c1"># Content checks (terminology, placeholders, quotation,</span>
                <span class="c1"># markup) on inactive historical candidates run only in</span>
                <span class="c1"># explicit history mode and are downgraded to warnings</span>
                <span class="c1"># unless all_versions_strict.</span>
                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">include_inactive_versions</span><span class="p">:</span>
                    <span class="k">continue</span>
                <span class="n">inactive_rec</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">TranslatedRecord</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nb">id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">target</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">inactive</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target</span><span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="n">inactive_findings</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">validate_record_pair</span><span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="n">source_rec</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">inactive_rec</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">context</span>
                <span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">finding</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">inactive_findings</span><span class="p">:</span>
                    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">finding</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">severity</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">Severity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ERROR</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">all_versions_strict</span><span class="p">:</span>
                        <span class="n">finding</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">severity</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Severity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">WARN</span>
                    <span class="n">finding</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">candidate_kind</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;translation&quot;</span>
                    <span class="n">finding</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">candidate_ref</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">inactive</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">version_ref</span>
                    <span class="n">finding</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">candidate_scope</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;inactive&quot;</span>
                    <span class="n">finding</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">message</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span>
                        <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;inactive version </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">inactive</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">version_ref</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">finding</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">message</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>
                    <span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="n">findings</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">extend</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">inactive_findings</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">merged</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">TranslatedChunk</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{}</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">source</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">source_chunks</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">items</span><span class="p">():</span>
        <span class="n">by_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">TranslatedRecord</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{}</span>
        <span class="n">legacy</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">valid_legacy</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">legacy</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">by_id</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">update</span><span class="p">({</span><span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">record</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">record</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">legacy</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">records</span><span class="p">})</span>
        <span class="n">by_id</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">update</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">store_records</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">{}))</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">by_id</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>
        <span class="n">merged</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">TranslatedChunk</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">records</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">[</span>
                <span class="n">by_id</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">record</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">source</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">records</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">by_id</span>
            <span class="p">],</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">EffectiveTranslations</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">chunks</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">merged</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">findings</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">findings</span><span class="p">)</span></div>



<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_context_render_drift_finding</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">project</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">context</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">TranslationContext</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">Finding</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Return a context_render_drift finding, or None when Markdown matches.</span>

<span class="sd">    Line endings are normalized before comparing. Unsafe Markdown-only or</span>
<span class="sd">    conflicting chapter notes point the user at ``context import-md``; only a</span>
<span class="sd">    safe (non chapter-note) render drift suggests ``context render --write``.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">context_markdown_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">is_file</span><span class="p">():</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">rendered</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">render_context_markdown</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">context</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">current_markdown</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">context_markdown_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="o">.</span><span class="n">read_bytes</span><span class="p">()</span>
        <span class="o">.</span><span class="n">decode</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;utf-8&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="o">.</span><span class="n">replace</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\r\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="o">.</span><span class="n">replace</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\r</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">current_markdown</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">rendered</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">replace</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\r\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">drift</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">analyze_context_markdown_drift</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">context</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">drift</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">parse_errors</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">detail</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;; &quot;</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">join</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">drift</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">parse_errors</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">message</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;context.md chapter notes could not be parsed: &quot;</span>
            <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">detail</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">. Fix </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">context_markdown_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">, then run &quot;</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;`booktx context import-md . --write`.&quot;</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">elif</span> <span class="n">drift</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">unsafe_to_overwrite</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">parts</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">drift</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">missing_in_json</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">parts</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;missing_in_json=</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="s1">&#39;,&#39;</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">join</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">drift</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">missing_in_json</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">drift</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">conflicting</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">parts</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;conflicting=</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="s1">&#39;,&#39;</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">join</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">drift</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">conflicting</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">message</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;context.md has chapter notes not safely represented &quot;</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;in context.json. &quot;</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="s2">&quot; &quot;</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">join</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">parts</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="s2">&quot;. Run `booktx &quot;</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;context import-md . --write` before rendering, or `booktx &quot;</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;context render . --write --force-discard-md-only` to discard &quot;</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;Markdown-only notes.&quot;</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">message</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;context.md differs from the current context.json render; &quot;</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;run `booktx context render . --write`&quot;</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;context&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">severity</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">Severity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">WARN</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">rule</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;context_render_drift&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">message</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">message</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_resolve_validation_scope</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">project</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">chapter_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">record_ids</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">set</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">task_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">tuple</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">set</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Resolve a validation scope from chapter/record/task filters.</span>

<span class="sd">    ``task_id`` expands to the task&#39;s chapter and record ids so a bounded</span>
<span class="sd">    task run scopes validation to just those records. Explicit ``chapter_id``</span>
<span class="sd">    and ``record_ids`` are passed through.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">task_id</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">chapter_id</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">record_ids</span>
    <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.config</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">load_translation_task</span>

    <span class="n">task</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">load_translation_task</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">task_id</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">task</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">chapter_id</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">record_ids</span>
    <span class="n">task_records</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span><span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">record</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">records</span><span class="p">}</span>
    <span class="n">merged_records</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">task_records</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">record_ids</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="nb">set</span><span class="p">())</span>
    <span class="n">resolved_chapter</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">chapter_id</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_id</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">resolved_chapter</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">merged_records</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="kc">None</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_scoped_chunk_ids</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">project</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">source_chunks</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">Chunk</span><span class="p">],</span>
    <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">chapter_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">record_ids</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">set</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">set</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Return the set of chunk ids in the validation scope, or None when unscoped.</span>

<span class="sd">    ``None`` means whole-project (every chunk is in scope). When a scope is</span>
<span class="sd">    set, the returned set contains only chunks holding at least one in-scope</span>
<span class="sd">    record, so the chunks_checked/passed/missing counters match the findings</span>
<span class="sd">    a scoped run actually shows.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">chapter_id</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">record_ids</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">scoped</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">set</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">set</span><span class="p">()</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">chapter_id</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">try</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.chapters</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">load_chapter_map</span>

            <span class="n">chapter_map</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">load_chapter_map</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">except</span> <span class="ne">Exception</span><span class="p">:</span>  <span class="c1"># noqa: BLE001</span>
            <span class="n">chapter_map</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">chapter_map</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">chapter</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">chapter_map</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapters</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">chapter</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_id</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">chapter_id</span><span class="p">:</span>
                    <span class="n">scoped</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">update</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">chapter</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunk_ids</span><span class="p">)</span>
                    <span class="k">break</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">record_ids</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">chunk</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">source_chunks</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">items</span><span class="p">():</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="nb">any</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">record_ids</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">record</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">chunk</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">records</span><span class="p">):</span>
                <span class="n">scoped</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">add</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">scoped</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="nb">set</span><span class="p">()</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">epub_preflight_findings_as_validation_findings</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">preflight_findings</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Any</span><span class="p">],</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Convert EPUB preflight findings into validation Findings with location.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">findings</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">pf</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">preflight_findings</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">findings</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">pf</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="s2">&quot;epub-preflight&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">severity</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">pf</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">severity</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">rule</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">pf</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">rule</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">message</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">pf</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">message</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">record_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">pf</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">record_ids</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">pf</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">record_ids</span><span class="p">),</span>
                <span class="n">chapter_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">pf</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">chapter_title</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">pf</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_title</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">span_index</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">pf</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">span_index</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">block_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">pf</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">block_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">document_href</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">pf</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">document_href</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">source</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">pf</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">target</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">pf</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">findings</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_epub_toc_audit_findings</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Run the EPUB TOC audit and convert findings to validation Findings.</span>

<span class="sd">    Returns an empty list for non-EPUB projects or when no EPUB template is</span>
<span class="sd">    stored. Audit errors map to validation errors; warnings map to warnings.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.epub_toc_audit</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">audit_epub_chapter_map</span>

    <span class="k">try</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">result</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">audit_epub_chapter_map</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">except</span> <span class="ne">Exception</span><span class="p">:</span>  <span class="c1"># noqa: BLE001 - audit must never break validation</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="n">findings</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">audit_finding</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">result</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">findings</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">findings</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;epub-chapter-audit&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">severity</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">audit_finding</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">severity</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">rule</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">audit_finding</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">code</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">message</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">audit_finding</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">message</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">document_href</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">audit_finding</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">href</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">chapter_title</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">audit_finding</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">title</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">record_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">audit_finding</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_record_id</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">findings</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_maybe_append_epub_toc_audit</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">report</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">ValidationReport</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">project</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">new_epub_pipeline</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">resolved_chapter</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">task_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Append EPUB TOC audit findings for unscoped EPUB validation runs.</span>

<span class="sd">    EPUB chapter completeness is a source-level concern. It is only surfaced</span>
<span class="sd">    for unscoped validation so a bounded `booktx check --chapter` run is not</span>
<span class="sd">    blocked by unrelated global chapter-map warnings.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">new_epub_pipeline</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">resolved_chapter</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">task_id</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span>
    <span class="n">report</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">findings</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">extend</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">_epub_toc_audit_findings</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">))</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_epub_output_policy_findings</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Findings for the resolved EPUB output policy (pre-build, deterministic).</span>

<span class="sd">    Covers invalid/explicit-missing language tags, translation profiles that</span>
<span class="sd">    preserve a differing source language, and pass-through profiles that</span>
<span class="sd">    explicitly opt into rewriting. These are warnings/errors only; CSS cascade</span>
<span class="sd">    conflicts are reported by the build audit, not here.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">config</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">format</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;epub&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.epub_output_policy</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">PolicyError</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">resolve_epub_output_policy</span>

    <span class="n">findings</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="k">try</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">policy</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">resolve_epub_output_policy</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">except</span> <span class="n">PolicyError</span> <span class="k">as</span> <span class="n">exc</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">msg</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">exc</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">rule</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;invalid_epub_output_language&quot;</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="s2">&quot;explicit&quot;</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">msg</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="s2">&quot;language&quot;</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">msg</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">rule</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;epub_output_explicit_language_missing&quot;</span>
        <span class="k">elif</span> <span class="s2">&quot;underscore&quot;</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">msg</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="s2">&quot;not a valid&quot;</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">msg</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">rule</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;invalid_epub_output_language&quot;</span>
        <span class="n">findings</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;epub_output&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">severity</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">Severity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ERROR</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">rule</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">rule</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">message</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">msg</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">findings</span>

    <span class="n">cfg</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">config</span>
    <span class="n">is_pass_through</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">profile_config</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
        <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">profile_config</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">kind</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;pass-through&quot;</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">policy</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">language_policy</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;preserve&quot;</span>
        <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">is_pass_through</span>
        <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">cfg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_language</span>
        <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">cfg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target_language</span>
        <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">cfg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_language</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">cfg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target_language</span>
    <span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="n">findings</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;epub_output&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">severity</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">Severity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">WARN</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">rule</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;epub_output_language_policy_preserves_source&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">message</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="s2">&quot;EPUB output language policy is &#39;preserve&#39; but the target &quot;</span>
                    <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;language </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">cfg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target_language</span><span class="si">!r}</span><span class="s2"> differs from source &quot;</span>
                    <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">cfg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_language</span><span class="si">!r}</span><span class="s2">; output will keep the source language.&quot;</span>
                <span class="p">),</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">is_pass_through</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">policy</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">language_policy</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;preserve&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">findings</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;epub_output&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">severity</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">Severity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">WARN</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">rule</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;epub_output_pass_through_rewrite_enabled&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">message</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="s2">&quot;pass-through profile explicitly opts into EPUB output &quot;</span>
                    <span class="s2">&quot;rewriting; default byte identity is lost.&quot;</span>
                <span class="p">),</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">findings</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_soft_hyphen_findings</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">effective</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">]:</span>  <span class="c1"># type: ignore[no-untyped-def]  # Phase 0 baseline: effective is an EffectiveTranslatedChunks bundle; see docs/mypy-baseline.md</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Warn once per record whose target text contains a soft hyphen (U+00AD).</span>

<span class="sd">    Soft hyphens in target text cause unpredictable reader-side breaks. They</span>
<span class="sd">    are warnings because a translator may insert them intentionally.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">config</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">format</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;epub&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="n">soft_hyphen</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\u00ad</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">findings</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">chunk</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">effective</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunks</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">values</span><span class="p">():</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">record</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">chunk</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">records</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">soft_hyphen</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">findings</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">(</span>
                        <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chunk</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                        <span class="n">severity</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">Severity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">WARN</span><span class="p">,</span>
                        <span class="n">rule</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;target_contains_soft_hyphen&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                        <span class="n">message</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">(</span>
                            <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;target for record </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> contains a soft hyphen &quot;</span>
                            <span class="s2">&quot;(U+00AD); this can cause unpredictable hyphenation.&quot;</span>
                        <span class="p">),</span>
                        <span class="n">record_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">findings</span>


<div class="viewcode-block" id="validate_project">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.validate.validate_project">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">validate_project</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">project</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">include_inactive_versions</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">all_versions_strict</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">chapter_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">record_ids</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">set</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">task_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">require_complete</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">ValidationReport</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Validate every translated chunk in ``project``.</span>

<span class="sd">    Missing translations are *not* errors; only present-but-invalid translated</span>
<span class="sd">    files produce error findings. Stale translated files whose chunk id no</span>
<span class="sd">    longer exists produce a warning.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">report</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ValidationReport</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">root</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">profile</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">profile</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">target_language</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">config</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target_language</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">target_locale</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">config</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target_locale</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">generated_at</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">datetime</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">now</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">timezone</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">utc</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">isoformat</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">timespec</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;seconds&quot;</span><span class="p">),</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">source_chunks</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">Chunk</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{}</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">path</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">sorted</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunks</span><span class="p">(),</span> <span class="n">key</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="k">lambda</span> <span class="n">path</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">path</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">stem</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="n">chunk</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">findings</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_load_source_chunk_with_findings</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">path</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">report</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">findings</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">extend</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">findings</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">chunk</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">source_chunks</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">path</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">stem</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">chunk</span>
    <span class="k">try</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">manifest</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">load_manifest</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">except</span> <span class="ne">Exception</span> <span class="k">as</span> <span class="n">exc</span><span class="p">:</span>  <span class="c1"># noqa: BLE001</span>
        <span class="n">manifest</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
        <span class="n">report</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">findings</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;manifest&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">severity</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">Severity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ERROR</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">rule</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;invalid_manifest&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">message</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;manifest.json is invalid: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">exc</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">manifest</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">manifest</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunk_size</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">config</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunk_size</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">report</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">findings</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;manifest&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">severity</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">Severity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">WARN</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">rule</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;manifest_chunk_size_drift&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">message</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">(</span>
                        <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;manifest chunk_size </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">manifest</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunk_size</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> differs from the &quot;</span>
                        <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;current config chunk_size </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">config</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunk_size</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>
                    <span class="p">),</span>
                <span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">manifest</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">record_id_scheme</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">RECORD_ID_SCHEME</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">report</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">findings</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;manifest&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">severity</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">Severity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ERROR</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">rule</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;manifest_record_id_scheme_mismatch&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">message</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">(</span>
                        <span class="s2">&quot;manifest record_id_scheme &quot;</span>
                        <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">manifest</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">record_id_scheme</span><span class="si">!r}</span><span class="s2"> does not match the current &quot;</span>
                        <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;supported scheme </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">RECORD_ID_SCHEME</span><span class="si">!r}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>
                    <span class="p">),</span>
                <span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">chunk</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">source_chunks</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">values</span><span class="p">():</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">chunk</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunk_size</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">manifest</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunk_size</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">report</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">findings</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">(</span>
                        <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chunk</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                        <span class="n">severity</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">Severity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ERROR</span><span class="p">,</span>
                        <span class="n">rule</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;chunk_manifest_chunk_size_mismatch&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                        <span class="n">message</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">(</span>
                            <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;chunk </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">chunk</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> has chunk_size &quot;</span>
                            <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">chunk</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunk_size</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">, but the manifest records &quot;</span>
                            <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">manifest</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunk_size</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>
                        <span class="p">),</span>
                    <span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">chunk</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">record_id_scheme</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">manifest</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">record_id_scheme</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">report</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">findings</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">(</span>
                        <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chunk</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                        <span class="n">severity</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">Severity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ERROR</span><span class="p">,</span>
                        <span class="n">rule</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;chunk_manifest_record_id_scheme_mismatch&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                        <span class="n">message</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">(</span>
                            <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;chunk </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">chunk</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> uses record_id_scheme &quot;</span>
                            <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">chunk</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">record_id_scheme</span><span class="si">!r}</span><span class="s2">, but the manifest records &quot;</span>
                            <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">manifest</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">record_id_scheme</span><span class="si">!r}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>
                        <span class="p">),</span>
                    <span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">new_epub_pipeline</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_uses_new_epub_pipeline</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">try</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">context</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">load_context</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">except</span> <span class="ne">Exception</span> <span class="k">as</span> <span class="n">exc</span><span class="p">:</span>  <span class="c1"># noqa: BLE001 - surface invalid context as a finding</span>
        <span class="n">context</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
        <span class="n">report</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">findings</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;context&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">severity</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">Severity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ERROR</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">rule</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;invalid_context&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">message</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;context.json is invalid: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">exc</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">effective</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">load_effective_translated_chunks</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">project</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">source_chunks</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">source_chunks</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">context</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">context</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">include_inactive_versions</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">include_inactive_versions</span><span class="p">,</span>
