        <span class="n">all_versions_strict</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">all_versions_strict</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">report</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">findings</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">extend</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">effective</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">findings</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="c1"># Resolve task_id scope into chapter/record filters so a bounded task run</span>
    <span class="c1"># does not get blocked by unrelated chapters.</span>
    <span class="n">resolved_chapter</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">resolved_record_ids</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_resolve_validation_scope</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">chapter_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chapter_id</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">record_ids</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">record_ids</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">task_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">task_id</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">scoped_chunks</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_scoped_chunk_ids</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">project</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">source_chunks</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">chapter_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">resolved_chapter</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">record_ids</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">resolved_record_ids</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">new_epub_pipeline</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.epub_preflight</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">validate_epub_inline_preflight</span>

        <span class="n">report</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">findings</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">extend</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">epub_preflight_findings_as_validation_findings</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">validate_epub_inline_preflight</span><span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="n">project</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">chapter_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">resolved_chapter</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">record_ids</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">resolved_record_ids</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">require_complete</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">require_complete</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">source_chunks</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">source_chunks</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">effective_chunks</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">effective</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunks</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">_maybe_append_epub_toc_audit</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">report</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">project</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">new_epub_pipeline</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">new_epub_pipeline</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">resolved_chapter</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">resolved_chapter</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">task_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">task_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">context</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">drift_finding</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_context_render_drift_finding</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">context</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">drift_finding</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">report</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">findings</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">drift_finding</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">report</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">findings</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">extend</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">_epub_output_policy_findings</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">))</span>
    <span class="n">report</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">findings</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">extend</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">_soft_hyphen_findings</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">effective</span><span class="p">))</span>
    <span class="c1"># Revision profiles: every active effective target must carry matching</span>
    <span class="c1"># judge-decision provenance.</span>
    <span class="n">report</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">findings</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">extend</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">_revision_provenance_findings</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">source_chunks</span><span class="p">))</span>

    <span class="c1"># Scope record-level findings to the resolved chapter/task/record set so a</span>
    <span class="c1"># bounded run is not blocked by findings in unrelated chapters. Structural</span>
    <span class="c1"># findings (manifest/context/store/ledger, whose chunk_id is not a real</span>
    <span class="c1"># source chunk) always remain; only findings attached to a source chunk</span>
    <span class="c1"># outside the scope are dropped. EPUB preflight findings are already scoped</span>
    <span class="c1"># by chapter inside validate_epub_inline_preflight.</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">scoped_chunks</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">report</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">findings</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span>
            <span class="n">finding</span>
            <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">finding</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">report</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">findings</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">finding</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">source_chunks</span>
            <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">finding</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">scoped_chunks</span>
        <span class="p">]</span>

    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">chunk_id</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">sorted</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">source_chunks</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">scoped_chunks</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">chunk_id</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">scoped_chunks</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>
        <span class="n">source</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">source_chunks</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">]</span>
        <span class="n">report</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunks_checked</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">new_epub_pipeline</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">report</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">findings</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">extend</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">_check_new_epub_source_chunk</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">source</span><span class="p">))</span>
        <span class="n">translated_chunk</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">effective</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunks</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">translated_chunk</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">translated_chunk</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">records</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">report</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunks_missing_translation</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>
        <span class="n">chunk_errors</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span>
            <span class="n">finding</span>
            <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">finding</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">report</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">findings</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">finding</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">chunk_id</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">finding</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">severity</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">Severity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ERROR</span>
        <span class="p">]</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">translated_chunk</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">records</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">source</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">records</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">chunk_errors</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">report</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunks_passed</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>

    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">report</span></div>



<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_revision_provenance_findings</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">project</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">source_chunks</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">Chunk</span><span class="p">]</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Append an ERROR finding per revision-provenance audit issue.</span>

<span class="sd">    Findings are record-attached (real chunk_id) so the existing scope filter</span>
<span class="sd">    treats them like any other record-level finding. Compare profiles return [].</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">is_revision_selection_profile</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="n">record_to_chunk</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span>
        <span class="n">rec</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">chunk</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">chunk</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">source_chunks</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">values</span><span class="p">()</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">rec</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">chunk</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">records</span>
    <span class="p">}</span>
    <span class="n">findings</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">issue</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">audit_revision_provenance</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">issues</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">findings</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">record_to_chunk</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">issue</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;selection-ledger&quot;</span><span class="p">),</span>
                <span class="n">severity</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">Severity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ERROR</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">rule</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">issue</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">code</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">message</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">issue</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">message</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">record_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">issue</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">findings</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_uses_new_epub_pipeline</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">bool</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">config</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">format</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;epub&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">False</span>
    <span class="k">try</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">manifest</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">load_manifest</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">except</span> <span class="ne">Exception</span><span class="p">:</span>  <span class="c1"># noqa: BLE001</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">False</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">manifest</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">False</span>
    <span class="k">try</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">load_epub_template_from_manifest</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">manifest</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">except</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">False</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">True</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_check_new_epub_source_chunk</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">source</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Chunk</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">]:</span>
    <span class="n">findings</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">record</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">source</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">records</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="s2">&quot;__TAG_&quot;</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="s2">&quot;__SPANTX_&quot;</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">findings</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">source</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">severity</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">Severity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ERROR</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">rule</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;epub_source_contains_legacy_placeholders&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">message</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">(</span>
                        <span class="s2">&quot;new EPUB extraction must not expose __TAG_NNN__ or &quot;</span>
                        <span class="s2">&quot;__SPANTX_NNNN__ placeholders in source records&quot;</span>
                    <span class="p">),</span>
                    <span class="n">record_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">findings</span>


<div class="viewcode-block" id="write_report">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.validate.write_report">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">write_report</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">report</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">ValidationReport</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Persist the validation report to ``.booktx/reports/`` and return it.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.io_utils</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">write_json_text_atomic</span>

    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">reports_dir</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;Reports directory is not configured.&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">reports_dir</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">mkdir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">parents</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">exist_ok</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">out</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">reports_dir</span> <span class="o">/</span> <span class="s2">&quot;validation-report.json&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">write_json_text_atomic</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">out</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">json</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">dumps</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">report</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">as_dict</span><span class="p">(),</span> <span class="n">indent</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">2</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">ensure_ascii</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">out</span></div>



<span class="c1"># Keep TOKEN_RE referenced for callers that want the raw regex.</span>
<span class="n">_token_re</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">TOKEN_RE</span>
<span class="n">_placeholder_cls</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Placeholder</span>  <span class="c1"># re-export surface stability</span>
</pre></div>
